affects.description: Affect lifecycle management: applying, joining, and copying affects to characters, objects, and rooms; removing affects by type, pattern, mark, or permanence; querying affect existence and finding specific instances; affect list iteration, sorting, deduplication, and checksum computation; attribute modification from affects; affect cache lookup and display; elemental effect propagation (cold, fire, acid, poison, shock); dispel checks on characters and objects; spell fading and undoing; remort-affect rolling, application, removal, and lookup; blank remort affect repair; gem effect compilation; blade enhancement; plague spreading; protection aura checks; room-level affect ticking; affect flag parsing, type lookup, and bit-to-type conversion; affect comparators for sorting by type, duration, mark, and permanence.
